//: 葳蕤经配套的基础疗伤丹：以木行生气炼草木而成，服之愈合外伤。做成 MED 类 comestible（同 aspirin：一枚一剂、不用 charges/stack_size）。activity_level 是 recipe 的必填字段、不是物品的。本物品 + 其配方共同演示「功法自带配方、学会功法即掌握」（配方由 EOC_immortal_path_bind_art_traits 的木行分支用 u_learn_recipe 授予）。数值保守，待平衡。/ The Sutra of Verdant Flourishing's basic healing pill, modeled as a MED comestible like aspirin (one item = one dose, no charges/stack_size). activity_level is mandatory on the recipe, not the item. Demonstrates art-bundled recipes.
description: 一枚青碧色的丹丸，透着草木清香。以木行生气温养炼成，服之可加速愈合外伤。
//en_us_description: A jade-green pill carrying the fresh scent of herbs. Refined with living Wood-qi; taking it speeds the healing of wounds.

//: 葳蕤木灵丹配方。autolearn:false——不靠技能自学；改由 EOC_immortal_path_bind_art_traits 的木行分支在学会养荣导引时 u_learn_recipe 直接授予，演示「功法自带配方」。activity_level 是 recipe 的必填字段（见 recipe.cpp）。用 firstaid 技能与常见草木材料，门槛低。材料/产出待平衡。/ Verdant pill recipe. Not autolearned; granted via u_learn_recipe in the Wood branch of EOC_immortal_path_bind_art_traits. activity_level is mandatory on recipes.
